subcodes.first_line: Make this land, O my God, blessed and secure for me. Guard me, then, O my God, at the time of my entering into it
subcodes.first_line_orig: فاجعل لی یا الهی هذه الارض مبارکا و امنا ثم احفظنی حین دخولی فیها و خروجی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution
